description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled handgun with a robust, utilitarian design. The main body and barrels are finished in a matte black, with a thick, rectangular profile and two prominent circular barrel openings at the front. The grip is angled and appears to be made of a dark brown or black material, likely wood or polymer, with a smooth surface and a slight ergonomic contour. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement, and the trigger itself is visible within. The rear of the handgun features a blocky, metallic section, possibly the hammer or breech, with a subtle metallic sheen. There are no visible engravings or markings on the slide or barrel, and the magazine base is not distinctly visible, suggesting an integrated or internal design.
description: A compact, double-barreled handgun with a matte black finish, ergonomic dark grip, and a large rounded trigger guard. The design is robust and minimalistic, with no visible markings or embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, circular barrel openings and the thick, rectangular profile of the handgun.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the double barrels, the angled grip, and the large rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip, the metallic rear section, and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the grip, trigger guard, and the solid, blocky construction.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angled and moderately contoured for ergonomic handling, with a smooth, dark surface that appears to be either polymer or wood. There are no visible finger grooves, checkering, or stippling, giving it a minimalist and clean appearance. The grip is slightly tapered towards the bottom, and no logos or embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, rounded, and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. It is constructed from the same material as the frame, with a smooth finish and no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian, lacking undercuts or squared-off edges.
attribute_barrel_type: The handgun features a short, double-barreled design with a thick, rectangular profile. The barrels are not threaded or ported, and there are no compensators or external features. The exterior is matte black with no visible markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel. The exterior is plain and unadorned, with a focus on functional design.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is not distinctly visible, suggesting an internal or integrated design. There are no extended, beveled, or flared features, and no finger rests, logos, or texturing are apparent.
